query:
UPDATE courses SET displayOrder = CASE 
  WHEN code = 'BIB10110' THEN 1
  WHEN code = 'BIB10210' THEN 2
  WHEN code = 'MIN201' THEN 3
  WHEN code = 'DIV101' THEN 4
  WHEN code = 'MIN301' THEN 5
  WHEN code = 'THE20145' THEN 6
  WHEN code = 'BIB20135' THEN 7
  WHEN code = 'THE30135' THEN 8
  WHEN code = 'MIN10130' THEN 9
  WHEN code = 'MIN10235' THEN 10
  WHEN code = 'SPR10130' THEN 11
  WHEN code = 'LED20135' THEN 12
  WHEN code = 'PAS20135' THEN 13
  WHEN code = 'PAS30130' THEN 14
  WHEN code = 'PAS10130' THEN 15
  WHEN code = 'SPR20135' THEN 16
  WHEN code = 'PAS30135' THEN 17
  ELSE displayOrder
END WHERE code IN ('BIB10110', 'BIB10210', 'MIN201', 'DIV101', 'MIN301', 'THE20145', 'BIB20135', 'THE30135', 'MIN10130', 'MIN10235', 'SPR10130', 'LED20135', 'PAS20135', 'PAS30130', 'PAS10130', 'SPR20135', 'PAS30135');
